info.title: 災鏈 ResQLink API
info.description: 堰塞湖災害通報與救災入口生成元件。

post.summary: Ingest a disaster alert and create an incident
post.description: event_type is a free string so unsupported values return 400, not 422.

post.summary: Generate rescue artifacts + review tasks for an incident
post.description:
Idempotent: re-bootstrapping returns the existing rows, no duplicates.

Omit ``module_ids`` to generate the scenario's default core modules, or pass
one or more module ids (from ``GET /v1/modules``) to generate exactly those.

parameters.name: module_ids

schema.description: 要生成的模組 id；省略則生成該災種的預設核心模組。
schema.title: Module Ids

parameters.description: 要生成的模組 id；省略則生成該災種的預設核心模組。

parameters.name: implemented

schema.description: 僅列已實作 / 未實作
schema.title: Implemented

parameters.description: 僅列已實作 / 未實作

post.summary: Understand a request and propose rescue modules
Generate the selected modules (each isolated, all reviewable)

get.summary: List submissions for a form (PII masked)

post.summary: Map a provided source payload into incidents
Ingest the connector's built-in sample payload (no key needed)
Live-fetch from the source and ingest (needs credentials)

get.summary: Get a single artifact with its content

post.summary: Approve a review task (artifact becomes approved)
Reject a review task (artifact becomes rejected)

get.summary: List disaster reports for an incident
Export geolocated reports as a GeoJSON FeatureCollection
get.description: Only geolocated reports; no PII in properties.

get.summary: Get a single disaster report (exposes PII — gate in production)

post.summary: Recompute a report's triage priority (module: report_auto_classify)
Set a report's verification status (verify / reject)

get.summary: List resource offers (omits provider contact PII)

post.summary: Dispatch a resource to a report (module: volunteer_dispatch)
Publish an approved outreach artifact (simulated connector)

get.description: Approved artifacts only; no review tasks, no PII.

get.summary: One-glance situation summary for an incident

module_ids.title: Module Ids
module_ids.description: 使用者選定的模組 id

message.title: Message
message.description: 自然語言的災害需求描述

incident_id.title: Incident Id
incident_id.description: 已存在的事件 id；省略則由描述建立新事件

source.title: Source
source.description: 資料來源，例如 manual / official

event_type.title: Event Type
event_type.description: 事件類型，支援 barrier_lake_alert / earthquake_alert / typhoon_alert / flood_alert

aoi.title: Aoi
aoi.description: 影響範圍 (GeoJSON Geometry，例如 Polygon)

example.title: 馬太鞍溪堰塞湖警戒事件

lat.title: Lat
lat.description: 緯度（與 lon 必須成對）

lon.title: Lon
lon.description: 經度（與 lat 必須成對）

DisasterReportCreate.title: DisasterReportCreate
DisasterReportCreate.description: lat and lon are optional but must be supplied together (else 422).

example.description: 住家一樓淤泥約 30 公分，需要協助清理

DisasterReportDetail.title: DisasterReportDetail
DisasterReportDetail.description: Exposes reporter PII; gate behind permission controls in production.

payload.title: Payload
payload.description: 依表單 fields 定義的作答內容（鍵為欄位 name）

status.title: Status
status.description: 建立結果狀態，例如 created

next.title: Next
next.description: 後續可呼叫的資源路徑

payload.title: Payload
payload.description: 來源原生回應（CWA / CAP JSON）

town.title: Town
town.description: 鄉鎮市區，例如 光復鄉

river.title: River
river.description: 河川名稱，例如 馬太鞍溪

matched_reports.title: Matched Reports
matched_reports.description: 有候選資源的開放通報數（全部，不受分頁影響）

unmatched_reports.title: Unmatched Reports
unmatched_reports.description: 找不到候選資源的開放通報數（全部）

channel.description: 發布管道；省略則依 artifact_type 自動判定

has_public_content.title: Has Public Content
has_public_content.description: 是否已有審核通過、可公開的元件

geolocated.title: Geolocated
geolocated.description: lat/lon 皆有、可上圖的通報數

critical_open.title: Critical Open
critical_open.description: triage 為 critical 且尚未結案的通報數

item.title: Item
item.description: 可協助項目 / 物資品項

ResourceOfferCreate.title: ResourceOfferCreate
ResourceOfferCreate.description: lat/lon optional but must be supplied together (else 422).

source_name.title: Source Name
source_name.description: 來源名稱，例如 manual / cwa

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: 設定 ADMIN_API_KEY 後，非公開端點需帶此標頭；公開災民端點（health / public preview / 通報與資源登錄）不需要。
